words.def: the lowest part of something, especially the part or surface on which it rests or stands
words.example: The lamp has a heavy base.

words.def: forming the part of something that is most necessary and from which other things develop
the way things are organized or arranged; how often something happens
words.example: We are in contact on a regular basis.

words.def: a device that is placed inside a car engine, clock, radio, etc. and that produces the electricity that makes it work
the quality of giving pleasure to the senses or to the mind
words.example: beauty of something, the beauty of the sunset/of poetry/of his singing

words.def: a black and yellow flying insect that can sting (= touch your skin and make you feel a sharp pain).Bees live in large groups and make honey (= a sweet sticky substance that is good to eat).
words.example: Bees were buzzing in the clover.

words.def: to do things in a particular way
a strong feeling that something/somebody exists or is true; confidence that something/somebody is good or right
words.example: belief in something/somebody, I admire his passionate belief in what he is doing.

words.def: a hollow metal object, often like a cup in shape, that makes a ringing sound when hit by a small piece of metal inside it; the sound that it makes
words.example: A peal of church bells rang out in the distance.

words.def: an advantage that something gives you; a helpful and useful effect that something has
words.example: Freedom of information brings great benefits.

words.def: of a higher standard or less poor quality; not as bad as something else
words.example: We're hoping for better weather tomorrow.

words.def: a container that you put waste in
the scientific study of the life and structure of plants and animals
an act of biting
words.example: The dog gave me a playful bite.

words.def: a large piece of a solid material that is square or rectangular in shape and usually has flat sides
words.example: The houses are made of concrete blocks with tin roofs.

words.def: a website where an individual person, or people representing an organization, write regularly about recent events or topics that interest them, usually with photos and links to other websites that they find interesting
words.example: This is a link to the museum's blog.

words.def: a long thin piece of strong hard material, especially wood, used, for example, for making floors, building walls and roofs and making boats
words.example: He had ripped up the carpet, leaving only the bare boards.

words.def: a weapon designed to explode at a particular time or when it is dropped or thrown
a strong shoe that covers the foot and ankle and often the lower part of the leg
to spend time and/or energy doing something
a part of a tree that grows out from the main stem and on which leaves, flowers and fruit grow
words.example: She climbed the tree and hid in the branches.

words.def: a type of product, service, etc. made or offered by a particular company under a particular name
willing to do things that are difficult, dangerous or painful; not afraid
the air that you take into your lungs and send out again
to take air into your lungs and send it out again through your nose or mouth
words.example: He breathed deeply before speaking again.

words.def: the action of taking air into the lungs and sending it out again
words.example: Her breathing became steady and she fell asleep.

words.def: a woman on her wedding day, or just before or just after it
words.example: a toast to the bride and groom

words.def: a ball of air or gas in a liquid, or a ball of air inside a solid substance such as glass
to place a dead body in the ground
words.example: bury somebody/something, They killed her and buried her body.

words.def: past
not excited, nervous or upset
words.example: It is important to keep calm in an emergency.

words.def: the buildings of a university or college and the land around them
a type of soft flat hat with a peak (= a hard curved part sticking out in front). Caps are worn especially by men and boys, often as part of a uniform
the person in charge of a ship or commercial aircraft
the series of jobs that a person has in a particular area of work, usually involving more responsibility as time passes
not giving enough attention and thought to what you are doing, so that you make mistakes
a piece of thick woven material made of wool, etc., used to cover the floor of a room or stairs; the material used for carpets
words.example: He spent the morning laying the new carpet.

words.def: a group of people or things with particular features in common
words.example: These are the nominees from each category.

words.def: a special event that people organize in order to celebrate something
words.example: The occasion was the 40th anniversary celebrations of the orchestra.

words.def: a famous person
in the centre of an area or object
the middle point or part of something
words.example: He walked to the centre of the circle.

words.def: a public or religious occasion that includes a series of formal or traditional actions
words.example: More than 1 000 people attended the ceremony.

words.def: a person, team, etc. that has won a competition, especially in a sport
a television station
a separate section of a book, usually with a number or title
the amount of money that somebody asks for goods and services
an organization for helping people in need
a friendly informal conversation
words.example: I just called in for a chat.

words.def: costing little money or less money than you expected
happy, and showing it by the way that you behave
words.example: You're not your usual cheerful self today.

words.def: connected with chemistry
words.example: changes in the chemical composition of the atmosphere

words.def: the scientific study of the structure of substances, how they react when combined or in contact with one another, and how they behave under different conditions
the top part of the front of the body, between the neck and the stomach
the period of somebody’s life when they are a child
